variants: Rakesh Daruwala is well-respected in the field of cartography, holding a Labyrinth Cartographer Accreditation that attests to his high level of expertise. His academic journey was significantly shaped by Borbala Gal, who served as his mentor while he completed his studies. In pursuit of his research, Rakesh received funding from the Indigo Spire Fellowship, which supported his endeavors considerably. His scholarly contributions have been disseminated through the Thunderleaf Manuscript House, where his work has found a platform. Alongside his academic and professional achievements, Rakesh is dedicated to community engagement as the Project Lead for Indigo Sky Refuge, where he contributes his skills to help those in need.
